SELECT  
 CASE WHEN WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1  WHEN WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY=-9997 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011800)*-1 ELSE WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY END SALES_ORDER_KEY 
  , CASE WHEN WI.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WI.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN WI.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=-9997 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011800)*-1 ELSE WI.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
  , CASE WHEN WI.PRODUCT_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WI.PRODUCT_KEY=-998 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN WI.PRODUCT_KEY=-997 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011800)*-1 ELSE WI.PRODUCT_KEY END PRODUCT_KEY 
  , CASE WHEN WI.AR_TRX_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WI.AR_TRX_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN WI.AR_TRX_KEY=-9997 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011800)*-1 ELSE WI.AR_TRX_KEY END AR_TRX_KEY 
  , CASE WHEN WI.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=-9999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 WHEN WI.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=-8888 THEN RANDOM(1005000,1006800)*-1 WHEN WI.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=-9997 THEN RANDOM(1010000,1011800)*-1 ELSE WI.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY END AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
  , CASE WHEN WI.END_CUSTOMER_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.END_CUSTOMER_KEY END END_CUSTOMER_KEY 
  , CASE WHEN WI.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
  , CASE WHEN WI.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
  , CASE WHEN WI.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
  , CASE WHEN WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 ELSE WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY END SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
  ,WI.SALES_REP_NUMBER,

 /* OA Q3FY14 */

  /* OA Q3FY14 */

 ,WI.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG
 ,WI.ELA_FLG

  ,WI.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT  /* ADDED  AS A PART OF Q1FY18 XAAS SOT*/
  ,WI.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD /* Added as part of Q1FY18 RO */

 ,WI.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG  ,WI.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG
,WI.DV_PRODUCT_SUBSCRIPTION_FLG
,WI.TSV_ACCRUALS_CD  /* added as part of Revenue accruals Q2FY19  */
,CASE WHEN WI.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY=-999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1  ELSE WI.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY END ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY /* added as part of Revenue accruals Q2FY19  */

,WI.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
